name: timer_behavior
description_pt: Timer wrapper com start/stop/restart/pause/resume. Emite timeout ao terminar e tick a cada ciclo (não one-shot). Parâmetros: wait_time, one_shot, auto_start. Base para spawner_wave, round_timer e cooldowns.
description_en: Timer wrapper with start/stop/restart/pause/resume. Emits timeout on finish and tick every cycle (non-one-shot). Parameters: wait_time, one_shot, auto_start. Base for spawner_wave, round_timer, and cooldowns.

parameters.name: one_shot
parameters.description_pt: Se true, dispara uma vez e para.

signals.name: tick
signals.description_pt: Emitido a cada ciclo (apenas quando one_shot=false).
